title: Dark factory: send input to running sessions
description: Add a new MCP tool that allows the bot to send keyboard input to a running dark factory session. This enables the bot to respond to interactive prompts (option selection, tool-use confirmations, etc.) without requiring a human to find and type into the terminal.
acceptanceCriteria: New MCP tool that accepts a session identifier and input text, and sends that input to the running dark factory terminal session
Tool reads recent session output before sending input so the bot understands context
Safe prompts (tool-use confirmations, continue/proceed) are auto-handled without user intervention
Non-obvious prompts (option selection, open-ended questions) are surfaced to the user for decision
Works with the existing start_dark_factory / read_dark_factory session naming convention
Error handling for sessions that don't exist or have already exited
